process: native Python FastMCP under pyenv 3.14.3 venv
dns: Cloudflare tunnel route DNS for recova-mcp-lab.slit.company
rollback: ssh mini 'restore ~/.cloudflared/config.yml from ~/.cloudflared/config.yml.recova-mcp-backup-* and launchctl kickstart -k gui/$(id -u)/com.slit.cliproxyapi-cloudflared'
Cloudflare dashboard or cloudflared cleanup: remove recova-mcp-lab.slit.company tunnel DNS route
